outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to deeply negative aggregate GEX (-1.68B). Dealers are short gamma, necessitating dynamic hedging which amplifies price swings. Pin risk at 585 is high for 0DTE, but broader trend is unstable.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the 585 Max Pain/Resonance level. Deeply negative GEX across all expiries creates an unstable environment where breaks of support (580) or resistance (590) will likely trigger accelerated moves. Watch for a break of the 580-590 range to determine the next directional leg.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant Call Open Interest across all expiries (12.7k 0DTE, 8.3k Weekly, 43k Monthly). Primary structural resistance capping the upside.
RESONANCE: High volume and OI concentration across all timeframes. Significant dealer long gamma support zone. Breach triggers dealer selling (short gamma hedging).
RESONANCE: Cluster of Max Pain (0DTE 585, Weekly 584, Monthly 590). Spot price is magnetized here. High OI on both sides creates a pinning effect.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Call OI in Monthly (21k) and 0DTE (7k). Aligns with Monthly Max Pain region. Acts as immediate resistance above spot.
CONFLUENCE: Massive structural support in Monthly (44k OI) and Weekly (17k OI). Deep value support in case of negative gamma flush.
CONFLUENCE: Strong Call OI in Weekly (9.6k) and 0DTE (7.1k). Secondary resistance before the 600 major wall.
CONFLUENCE: Consistent Put OI in 0DTE (10k) and Monthly (22k). Intermediate support between 580 and 570.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Near-term stability from positive GEX (+20B), but monthly negative GEX (-8.96B) creates volatility tail risk. Expect pinning behavior near 6600 with potential volatility expansion on break of key levels.
outlook.summary: Market exhibits bearish sentiment with elevated PCR (1.43-3.15) and smirk skew across all expiries. Spot at 6630 trades between 0DTE gamma flip (6506) and weekly gamma flip (6712). Dealers are long gamma near-term but short monthly, creating a pinning regime with underlying volatility risk. Max pain at 6585 suggests downward magnetic pull. Key focus: 6600 resonance level for directional resolution.

levels.motivazione: ATM pinning zone with massive 0DTE CALL volume (96K) and significant OI across all expiries. Near max pain (6585). Primary magnetic level for price resolution.
Major structural support with 25K+ monthly PUT OI. Appears as significant PUT WALL across all three expiries. Key downside protection level.
Dominant CALL OI in 0DTE (10.6K) and WEEKLY (9K). Key resistance zone capping upside moves. High IV suggests strong dealer hedging.
0DTE gamma flip marking sentiment equilibrium. Below spot, acts as support. Critical for intraday direction. Break below triggers dealer selling.
0DTE max pain level where option value is minimized. 45 points below spot, creating strong downward magnetic pull. Dealer target zone.
Deep PUT support with 18K OI in both 0DTE and MONTHLY. Secondary structural support. High IV (32%) indicates strong hedging demand.
Monthly CALL WALL with 17.9K OI. Major resistance for longer-term moves. Monthly max pain nearby (6955) - dealer target zone.
Weekly gamma flip above spot. Marks upper boundary of gamma-neutral zone. Confluence with 6700 CALL OI creates resistance.
